request.query: How are lung cancer trials distributed across phases?

meta.query_interpretation: Interpreted as a distribution query, about lung cancer, grouped by phase.
meta.notes: A trial can be registered under multiple phases (or none), so per-phase counts need not sum to the total trial count. Counts are exact per bucket (ClinicalTrials.gov countTotal); up to 5 sample studies are cited per data point.
